title: Program termination
doc_html:
§1931.  Program termination

The commissioner shall not certify a capital company to begin the program later than June 30, 2003.  The commissioner shall not certify capital later than December 31, 2003.

Acts 1983, No. 642, §1; Acts 1989, No. 496, §1; Acts 1992, No. 849, §2; Acts 1993, No. 279, §2, eff. June 2, 1993; Acts 1994, 3rd Ex. Sess., No. 9, §2; Acts 1996, No. 21, §2, eff. June 27, 1996; Acts 1998, No. 70, §2, eff. Oct. 1, 1998; Acts 2001, No. 1122, §1, eff. July 1, 2001; Acts 2002, No. 84, §2, eff. June 25, 2002.
doc_text:
§1931.  Program termination
The commissioner shall not certify a capital company to begin the program later than June 30, 2003.  The commissioner shall not certify capital later than December 31, 2003.
Acts 1983, No. 642, §1; Acts 1989, No. 496, §1; Acts 1992, No. 849, §2; Acts 1993, No. 279, §2, eff. June 2, 1993; Acts 1994, 3rd Ex. Sess., No. 9, §2; Acts 1996, No. 21, §2, eff. June 27, 1996; Acts 1998, No. 70, §2, eff. Oct. 1, 1998; Acts 2001, No. 1122, §1, eff. July 1, 2001; Acts 2002, No. 84, §2, eff. June 25, 2002.
